title: The Rescue Pushes Forward
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo, Unknown person #4, Smoker. The central beat is the rescue pushes forward.
scene: The scene focuses on the rescue pushes forward, with Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo, Unknown person #4, Smoker shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You've done a thorough job... Law

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This was quite un- expected in

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: You don't know anything of Joker's past

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And that will be your downfall!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Worry about your- self for now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Our Comrade is stuck under this rubble

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Let Shinokuni Flow into this room !!!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Shinokuni will be my true power !!!

summary: The Rescue Pushes Forward. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
